div.h1: Intel-Grade Cache Line Analysis: Split-Ordered List Traversal
div.p: Linked list traversal is cache-hostile — each node access is a potential cache miss. Design Spec: HashMapNode Alignment & Temporal/Spatial Locality

ul.li: Packing Density: 2 Nodes per 64B Cache Line
Boundary Condition: If &node % 64 == 32, node is perfectly aligned within half a line.
False Sharing: Atomic next pointer at 0x18 is adjacent to data. Concurrent writes to next invalidate entire line for other cores.

div.p: Stall Analysis: A single DRAM fetch consumes execution resources for ~350 instruction slots.

ol.li: Allocation Locality: Use custom pool allocator to keep nodes in contiguous cache lines.
SIMD Filtering: Process so_key comparisons using AVX-512 for batch traversal.

text.tspan: // Software Prefetching (T0 Hint - Fetch to all cache levels)
// Execute logic while memory subsystem fetches next_ptr
// Software Prefetching (T0 Hint - Fetch to all cache levels)
// Execute logic while memory subsystem fetches next_ptr
